items.q: What is the approximate molar mass of CO2 (g/mol)? (set 26)
items.explanation: Add atomic masses multiplied by each atom count.

items.q: What type of bond usually forms between non-metals sharing electrons? (set 24)
items.explanation: Shared electron pairs define covalent bonding.

items.q: Name the compound with formula N2.
Name the compound with formula NaOH.
items.explanation: NaOH is commonly called sodium hydroxide.

items.q: What compound name matches the formula C2H5OH?
Endothermic reactions absorb energy from surroundings.

items.q: What particle determines an element's atomic number? (set 27)
items.explanation: Atomic number equals the number of protons.

items.q: What is the approximate molar mass of N2 (g/mol)?
items.explanation: Add atomic masses multiplied by each atom count.

items.q: Name the compound with formula NaCl.
items.explanation: NaCl is commonly called sodium chloride.
